column.name: DEADLOCK_ID
column.Comment: The ID to distinguish different deadlock events

column.name: OCCUR_TIME
column.Comment: The physical time when the deadlock occurs

column.name: RETRYABLE
column.Comment: Whether the deadlock is retryable. Retryable deadlocks are usually not reported to the client

column.name: TRY_LOCK_TRX_ID
column.Comment: The transaction ID (start ts) of the transaction that's trying to acquire the lock

column.name: CURRENT_SQL_DIGEST
column.Comment: The digest of the SQL that's being blocked

column.name: CURRENT_SQL_DIGEST_TEXT
column.Comment: The normalized SQL that's being blocked

column.name: KEY
column.Comment: The key on which a transaction is waiting for another

column.name: TRX_HOLDING_LOCK
column.Comment: The transaction ID (start ts) of the transaction that's currently holding the lock

column.name: SAMPLE_USER
column.Comment: Sampled user who executed these statements

column.name: MAX_COP_PROCESS_ADDRESS
column.Comment: Address of the CopTask with max processing time

column.name: MAX_COP_WAIT_ADDRESS
column.Comment: Address of the CopTask with max waiting time

column.name: AVG_ROCKSDB_DELETE_SKIPPED_COUNT
column.Comment: Average number of rocksdb delete skipped count

column.name: MAX_ROCKSDB_DELETE_SKIPPED_COUNT
column.Comment: Max number of rocksdb delete skipped count

column.name: AVG_ROCKSDB_KEY_SKIPPED_COUNT
column.Comment: Average number of rocksdb key skipped count

column.name: MAX_ROCKSDB_KEY_SKIPPED_COUNT
column.Comment: Max number of rocksdb key skipped count

column.name: AVG_ROCKSDB_BLOCK_CACHE_HIT_COUNT
column.Comment: Average number of rocksdb block cache hit count

column.name: MAX_ROCKSDB_BLOCK_CACHE_HIT_COUNT
column.Comment: Max number of rocksdb block cache hit count

column.name: AVG_ROCKSDB_BLOCK_READ_COUNT
column.Comment: Average number of rocksdb block read count

column.name: MAX_ROCKSDB_BLOCK_READ_COUNT
column.Comment: Max number of rocksdb block read count

column.name: AVG_ROCKSDB_BLOCK_READ_BYTE
column.Comment: Average number of rocksdb block read byte

column.name: MAX_ROCKSDB_BLOCK_READ_BYTE
column.Comment: Max number of rocksdb block read byte

column.name: AVG_COMMIT_BACKOFF_TIME
column.Comment: Average time before retry during commit phase

column.name: MAX_COMMIT_BACKOFF_TIME
column.Comment: Max time before retry during commit phase

column.name: AVG_LOCAL_LATCH_WAIT_TIME
column.Comment: Average waiting time of local transaction

column.name: MAX_LOCAL_LATCH_WAIT_TIME
column.Comment: Max waiting time of local transaction

column.name: AVG_PREWRITE_REGIONS
column.Comment: Average number of involved regions in prewrite phase

column.name: MAX_PREWRITE_REGIONS
column.Comment: Max number of involved regions in prewrite phase

column.name: SUM_EXEC_RETRY
column.Comment: Sum number of execution retries in pessimistic transactions

column.name: SUM_EXEC_RETRY_TIME
column.Comment: Sum time of execution retries in pessimistic transactions

column.name: BACKOFF_TYPES
column.Comment: Types of errors and the number of retries for each type

column.name: AVG_WRITE_SQL_RESP_TIME
column.Comment: Average time of write sql resp used

column.name: MAX_RESULT_ROWS
column.Comment: Max count of sql result rows

column.name: MIN_RESULT_ROWS
column.Comment: Min count of sql result rows

column.name: AVG_RESULT_ROWS
column.Comment: Average count of sql result rows

column.name: FIRST_SEEN
column.Comment: The time these statements are seen for the first time

column.name: LAST_SEEN
column.Comment: The time these statements are seen for the last time

column.name: PLAN_IN_CACHE
column.Comment: Whether the last statement hit plan cache

column.name: PLAN_CACHE_HITS
column.Comment: The number of times these statements hit plan cache

column.name: PLAN_IN_BINDING
column.Comment: Whether the last statement is matched with the hints in the binding

column.name: SAMPLE_USER
column.Comment: Sampled user who executed these statements

column.name: MAX_COP_PROCESS_ADDRESS
column.Comment: Address of the CopTask with max processing time

column.name: MAX_COP_WAIT_ADDRESS
column.Comment: Address of the CopTask with max waiting time

column.name: ROCKSDB_BLOCK_CACHE_HIT_COUNT
column.Comment: Total RocksDB block cache hit count

column.name: COMMIT_BACKOFF_TIME
column.Comment: Total time before retry during commit phase

column.name: LOCAL_LATCH_WAIT_TIME
column.Comment: Total waiting time of local transaction

column.name: PREWRITE_REGIONS
column.Comment: Total number of involved regions in prewrite phase

column.name: EXEC_RETRY
column.Comment: Sum number of execution retries in pessimistic transactions

column.name: EXEC_RETRY_TIME
column.Comment: Sum time of execution retries in pessimistic transactions

column.name: BACKOFF_TYPES
column.Comment: Types of errors and the number of retries for each type

column.name: BACKOFF_TOTAL_TIME
column.Comment: Total time spent in backoff and retry

column.name: WRITE_SQL_RESP_TIME
column.Comment: Total time used to write a response to the client.

column.name: RESULT_ROWS
column.Comment: Total count of SQL result rows

column.name: FIRST_SEEN
column.Comment: The time these statements are seen for the first time

column.name: LAST_SEEN
column.Comment: The time these statements are seen for the last time

column.name: PLAN_IN_CACHE
column.Comment: Whether the last statement hit the plan cache

column.name: PLAN_CACHE_HITS
column.Comment: The number of times these statements hit the plan cache

column.name: PLAN_IN_BINDING
column.Comment: Whether the last statement is matched with the hints in the binding

column.name: CURRENT_SQL_DIGEST
column.Comment: Digest of the sql the transaction are currently running

column.name: CURRENT_SQL_DIGEST_TEXT
column.Comment: The normalized sql the transaction are currently running

column.name: STATE
column.Comment: Current running state of the transaction

column.name: MEM_BUFFER_KEYS
column.Comment: How many entries are in MemDB

column.name: SESSION_ID
column.Comment: Which session this transaction belongs to

column.name: USER
column.Comment: The user who open this session

column.name: DB
column.Comment: The schema this transaction works on

column.name: ALL_SQL_DIGESTS
column.Comment: A list of the digests of SQL statements that the transaction has executed

column.name: RELATED_TABLE_IDS
column.Comment: A list of the table IDs that the transaction has accessed

column.name: ALL_SQL_DIGESTS
column.Comment: A list of the digests of SQL statements that the transaction has executed

column.name: KEY
column.Comment: The key that's being waiting on

column.name: TRX_ID
column.Comment: Current transaction that's waiting for the lock

column.name: CURRENT_HOLDING_TRX_ID
column.Comment: The transaction that's holding the lock and blocks the current transaction

column.name: SQL_DIGEST
column.Comment: Digest of the SQL that's trying to acquire the lock

column.name: SQL_DIGEST_TEXT
column.Comment: Digest of the SQL that's trying to acquire the lock

column.name: DEADLOCK_ID
column.Comment: The ID to distinguish different deadlock events

column.name: OCCUR_TIME
column.Comment: The physical time when the deadlock occurs

column.name: RETRYABLE
column.Comment: Whether the deadlock is retryable. Retryable deadlocks are usually not reported to the client

column.name: TRY_LOCK_TRX_ID
column.Comment: The transaction ID (start ts) of the transaction that's trying to acquire the lock

column.name: CURRENT_SQL_DIGEST
column.Comment: The digest of the SQL that's being blocked

column.name: CURRENT_SQL_DIGEST_TEXT
column.Comment: The normalized SQL that's being blocked

column.name: KEY
column.Comment: The key on which a transaction is waiting for another

column.name: TRX_HOLDING_LOCK
column.Comment: The transaction ID (start ts) of the transaction that's currently holding the lock

column.name: SAMPLE_USER
column.Comment: Sampled user who executed these statements

column.name: MAX_COP_PROCESS_ADDRESS
column.Comment: Address of the CopTask with max processing time

column.name: MAX_COP_WAIT_ADDRESS
column.Comment: Address of the CopTask with max waiting time

column.name: AVG_ROCKSDB_DELETE_SKIPPED_COUNT
column.Comment: Average number of rocksdb delete skipped count

column.name: MAX_ROCKSDB_DELETE_SKIPPED_COUNT
column.Comment: Max number of rocksdb delete skipped count

column.name: AVG_ROCKSDB_KEY_SKIPPED_COUNT
column.Comment: Average number of rocksdb key skipped count

column.name: MAX_ROCKSDB_KEY_SKIPPED_COUNT
column.Comment: Max number of rocksdb key skipped count

column.name: AVG_ROCKSDB_BLOCK_CACHE_HIT_COUNT
column.Comment: Average number of rocksdb block cache hit count

column.name: MAX_ROCKSDB_BLOCK_CACHE_HIT_COUNT
column.Comment: Max number of rocksdb block cache hit count

column.name: AVG_ROCKSDB_BLOCK_READ_COUNT
column.Comment: Average number of rocksdb block read count

column.name: MAX_ROCKSDB_BLOCK_READ_COUNT
column.Comment: Max number of rocksdb block read count

column.name: AVG_ROCKSDB_BLOCK_READ_BYTE
column.Comment: Average number of rocksdb block read byte

column.name: MAX_ROCKSDB_BLOCK_READ_BYTE
column.Comment: Max number of rocksdb block read byte

column.name: AVG_COMMIT_BACKOFF_TIME
column.Comment: Average time before retry during commit phase

column.name: MAX_COMMIT_BACKOFF_TIME
column.Comment: Max time before retry during commit phase

column.name: AVG_LOCAL_LATCH_WAIT_TIME
column.Comment: Average waiting time of local transaction

column.name: MAX_LOCAL_LATCH_WAIT_TIME
column.Comment: Max waiting time of local transaction

column.name: AVG_PREWRITE_REGIONS
column.Comment: Average number of involved regions in prewrite phase

column.name: MAX_PREWRITE_REGIONS
column.Comment: Max number of involved regions in prewrite phase

column.name: SUM_EXEC_RETRY
column.Comment: Sum number of execution retries in pessimistic transactions

column.name: SUM_EXEC_RETRY_TIME
column.Comment: Sum time of execution retries in pessimistic transactions

column.name: BACKOFF_TYPES
column.Comment: Types of errors and the number of retries for each type

column.name: AVG_WRITE_SQL_RESP_TIME
column.Comment: Average time of write sql resp used

column.name: MAX_RESULT_ROWS
column.Comment: Max count of sql result rows

column.name: MIN_RESULT_ROWS
column.Comment: Min count of sql result rows

column.name: AVG_RESULT_ROWS
column.Comment: Average count of sql result rows

column.name: FIRST_SEEN
column.Comment: The time these statements are seen for the first time

column.name: LAST_SEEN
column.Comment: The time these statements are seen for the last time

column.name: PLAN_IN_CACHE
column.Comment: Whether the last statement hit plan cache

column.name: PLAN_CACHE_HITS
column.Comment: The number of times these statements hit plan cache

column.name: PLAN_IN_BINDING
column.Comment: Whether the last statement is matched with the hints in the binding

column.name: REGION_COUNT
column.Comment: The region count of single replica of the table

column.name: EMPTY_REGION_COUNT
column.Comment: The region count of single replica of the table

column.name: TABLE_SIZE
column.Comment: The disk usage(MB) of single replica of the table, if the table size is empty or less than 1MB, it would show 1MB

column.name: TABLE_KEYS
column.Comment: The count of keys of single replica of the table

column.name: SAMPLE_USER
column.Comment: Sampled user who executed these statements

column.name: MAX_COP_PROCESS_ADDRESS
column.Comment: Address of the CopTask with max processing time

column.name: MAX_COP_WAIT_ADDRESS
column.Comment: Address of the CopTask with max waiting time

column.name: ROCKSDB_BLOCK_CACHE_HIT_COUNT
column.Comment: Total RocksDB block cache hit count

column.name: COMMIT_BACKOFF_TIME
column.Comment: Total time before retry during commit phase

column.name: LOCAL_LATCH_WAIT_TIME
column.Comment: Total waiting time of local transaction

column.name: PREWRITE_REGIONS
column.Comment: Total number of involved regions in prewrite phase

column.name: EXEC_RETRY
column.Comment: Sum number of execution retries in pessimistic transactions

column.name: EXEC_RETRY_TIME
column.Comment: Sum time of execution retries in pessimistic transactions

column.name: BACKOFF_TYPES
column.Comment: Types of errors and the number of retries for each type

column.name: BACKOFF_TOTAL_TIME
column.Comment: Total time spent in backoff and retry

column.name: WRITE_SQL_RESP_TIME
column.Comment: Total time used to write a response to the client.

column.name: RESULT_ROWS
column.Comment: Total count of SQL result rows

column.name: FIRST_SEEN
column.Comment: The time these statements are seen for the first time

column.name: LAST_SEEN
column.Comment: The time these statements are seen for the last time

column.name: PLAN_IN_CACHE
column.Comment: Whether the last statement hit the plan cache

column.name: PLAN_CACHE_HITS
column.Comment: The number of times these statements hit the plan cache

column.name: PLAN_IN_BINDING
column.Comment: Whether the last statement is matched with the hints in the binding

column.name: CURRENT_SQL_DIGEST
column.Comment: Digest of the sql the transaction are currently running

column.name: CURRENT_SQL_DIGEST_TEXT
column.Comment: The normalized sql the transaction are currently running

column.name: STATE
column.Comment: Current running state of the transaction

column.name: MEM_BUFFER_KEYS
column.Comment: How many entries are in MemDB

column.name: SESSION_ID
column.Comment: Which session this transaction belongs to

column.name: USER
column.Comment: The user who open this session

column.name: DB
column.Comment: The schema this transaction works on

column.name: ALL_SQL_DIGESTS
column.Comment: A list of the digests of SQL statements that the transaction has executed

column.name: RELATED_TABLE_IDS
column.Comment: A list of the table IDs that the transaction has accessed

column.name: ALL_SQL_DIGESTS
column.Comment: A list of the digests of SQL statements that the transaction has executed

column.name: instance
column.Comment: address of the TiDB instance executing the analyze job

column.name: process_id
column.Comment: ID of the process executing the analyze job

index.name: sql_index
index.Comment: accelerate the speed when add global binding query

index.name: time_index
index.Comment: accelerate the speed when querying with last update time

column.name: filter_type
column.Comment: type of the filter, only db, table and frequency supported now

column.name: instance
column.Comment: address of the TiDB instance executing the plan replayer job

column.name: seq_no
column.Comment: sequence number of the gzipped data slice

column.name: version
column.Comment: stats version which corresponding to stats:version in EXPLAIN

column.name: version
column.Comment: stats version which corresponding to stats:version in EXPLAIN
